properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some glad morning, when this life is o’er— I’ll fly away To a Home of God’s celestial shore— I’ll fly away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ll fly away, O Glory, I’ll fly away— I shall not die, Hallelujah, by-and-by, I’ll fly away.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the shadows of this life have gone, I’ll fly away Like a bird from prison bars has flown, I’ll fly away.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just a few more weary days and then, I’ll fly away To a land where joys shall never end, I’ll fly away.
